overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Legend of Zelda showing the protagonist Link running through tall coastal grasslands during golden hour, approaching Hateno Beach. The character traverses a grassy hillside with palm trees, descends toward a large coastal cliff formation, and enters the shallow ocean water as the sun sets.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal grassland with palm trees overlooking ocean

agents.ego_description: Link is running forward through tall grass toward the distant coastline, with palm trees ahead and the ocean visible in the distance

entered.detail: Group of palm trees standing on the hillside ahead
Large boulder formation on the left side of the grassy hill
Massive flat-topped cliff formation visible on the horizon
Calm ocean water visible beyond the grassy hills
Tall green grass covering the ground throughout the scene

segments.scene_description: Link runs through dense tall grass on a coastal hillside during golden hour. Palm trees stand ahead while a large rock outcrop sits to the left, and the ocean stretches out in the distance beneath a warm sunset sky.

events.description: Location text 'Hateno Beach' appears on screen, identifying the area
Character begins descending steeper terrain toward the shoreline

agents.ego_description: Link continues running downhill toward the beach, approaching the water's edge with the large coastal cliff now prominent on the right side

entered.detail: Sandy beach area becoming visible at the base of the hill where grass meets water

segments.scene_description: The location text 'Hateno Beach' appears as Link descends the grassy hillside. The large coastal cliff looms larger on the right while the sandy shoreline and ocean become more prominent ahead. The palm trees and rock outcrops fall behind as the terrain slopes down toward the water.

events.description: Character transitions from running on grass/sand to entering the ocean water
Character begins swimming as the water depth increases

agents.ego_description: Link runs into the shallow ocean water and begins swimming forward as the water level rises around the character

segments.scene_description: Link enters the shallow turquoise water at the beach's edge and begins swimming. The large coastal cliff now appears in the distance to the right, while the shoreline falls behind. The water reflects the golden sunset light as the character moves deeper into the ocean.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a lush coastal hillside down into the shimmering waters of a sunset beach. It begins with Link running through dense tall grass and past palm trees, with a large rock outcrop to the left and the ocean stretching toward a warm horizon. As the character descends the slope, the terrain shifts from grassy highlands to a sandy shoreline, causing the palm trees to recede while a massive coastal cliff looms larger on the right. The scene then opens up as Link reaches the water's edge, transitioning from the beach into shallow turquoise waves. Finally, the camera follows him as he begins swimming deeper into the ocean, with the golden sunset reflecting off the surface and the distant cliff remaining to the right.
